top3.sql:
SELECT MAX(amount) 
FROM trans 
WHERE account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id 
    FROM disp 
    WHERE disp_id IN (
        SELECT disp_id 
        FROM card 
        WHERE issued = '1996-10-21'
    )
);

SELECT MAX(amount) 
FROM trans 
WHERE account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id 
    FROM disp 
    WHERE disp_id IN (
        SELECT disp_id 
        FROM card 
        WHERE issued LIKE '961021%'
    )
);

SELECT MAX(amount) 
FROM trans 
WHERE account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id 
    FROM disp 
    WHERE disp_id IN (
        SELECT disp_id 
        FROM card 
        WHERE issued = '1996-10-21'
    )
);

SELECT MAX(t.amount) 
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE c.issued LIKE '961021%';

SELECT MAX(t.amount)
FROM trans t
JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE c.issued = '1996-10-21';

JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
